testimonials.name: Margaret T.
testimonials.text: After my hip replacement, home visits made recovery so much easier. Professional, kind, and always on time.

testimonials.name: James K.
testimonials.text: No more struggling to get to a clinic. My back pain is finally under control with exercises I can do at home.

testimonials.name: Priya S.
testimonials.text: The physiotherapist explained everything clearly and adapted each session to my living space. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: Excellent care for my elderly father. Patient, respectful, and we have seen real improvement in his mobility.

testimonials.name: Elena M.
testimonials.text: From booking to treatment, the whole experience was smooth. Five stars for the home visit service.

testimonials.name: Tom W.
testimonials.text: Clear treatment plan, gentle hands-on work, and follow-ups that actually fit my schedule.
